suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make the brainstorming requirement unambiguously satisfiable in non-interactive Exec Mode so transport/core workers do not have to report `followedProcedure=false` after using the documented fallback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The prior round added commit `8bb6688` to clarify the fallback, but the review for `core-foundation-fix-http-loopback-wire-compat` still found `.factory/skills/sdk-core-worker/SKILL.md:16-24` leaves the brainstorming approval loop ambiguous enough that the fix handoff records `followedProcedure=false` for that step.
